quotes.text: At a place called Meribah, one of the greatest ever, Moses, was fatigued by people clamoring for water. Momentarily, Moses “spake unadvisedly,” saying, “Must we fetch you water?” (Psalm 106:33; Numbers 20:10; see also Deuteronomy 4:21). The Lord mentored remarkable Moses through the pronoun problem and further magnified him. We would do well to be as meek as Moses (see Numbers 12:3).
quotes.speaker: Neal A. Maxwell
quotes.attr: Neal A. Maxwell, in Conference Report, Apr. 2002, 43; or Ensign, May 2002, 37

notes: JST The word "repented" should read "spared his people".
